actionCalls.name: Copy_3_of_Log_Error_Sending_Email_to_Patient
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Getting Email Template - GT

value.stringValue: Error while getting the rejection email template

actionCalls.name: Log_Did_Not_Send_Rejection_Email_To_Patient_Email_Bounced
actionCalls.label: Log Did Not Send Rejection Email To Patient - Email Bounced

value.stringValue: Did not send the rejection email to patient as their email is on the account is currently marked bounced.

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Getting_Email_Template_PGT
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Getting Email Template - PGT

value.stringValue: Error while getting the rejection email template

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Sending_Email_to_Patient
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Sending Email to Patient

value.stringValue: Error while sending patient rejection email.
Error Updating New Lab Order Record: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Update_Original_Lab_Order
actionCalls.label: Log Error Update Original Lab Order

value.stringValue: Error Updating Original Lab Order Record: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}
Record Trigger - Lab Order - Lab Order Rejected Flow Started
More than 3 reship attempts, email sent to the Account owner: {!$Record.Opportunity__r.Account.Owner.Email}
Submitted new Lab Request after rejection. New Lab Order Id: {!rec_LabOrder.Id}

assignments.name: Set_Email_Template_Precision_Genetic_Testing
assignments.label: Set Email Template - Precision Genetic Testing

assignments.name: Set_Lab_Order_Values_Too_Many_Requests
assignments.label: Set Lab Order Values - Too Many Requests

assignments.name: Set_Opportunity_Stage_Kit_Needs_Sent
assignments.label: Set Opportunity Stage - Kit Needs Sent

assignments.description: If there are more than 3 attempts we will fail out and manual intervention will need to happen from a PSR/Wellness Advisor.
assignments.name: Set_Opportunity_Values_Too_Many_Requests
assignments.label: Set Opportunity Values - Too Many Requests

assignments.name: Set_Original_Lab_Order_Rejected_Status
assignments.label: Set Original Lab Order - Rejected Status

decisions.description: Sample is Rejected by the lab, a new test will be auto-shipped out
decisions.name: Do_we_need_to_Auto_Reship_on_Rejection
decisions.label: Do we need to Auto Reship on Rejection

decisions.description: Depending on the Services Rendered we will send a rejection email to the patient informing them that they will get a new kit.
decisions.name: Do_We_Need_to_Send_a_Rejection_Email_to_Patient
decisions.label: Do We Need to Send a Rejection Email to Patient
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Service doesn't have a rejection email.

decisions.description: Check if there is an Opportunity Id
decisions.name: Do_we_need_to_update_Opportunity
decisions.label: Do we need to update Opportunity

decisions.description: Here we will check if the Reship Reorder field is set to true; if so then we will reset the status and values.
decisions.name: Is_Order_a_Rejected_Reship
decisions.label: Is Order a Rejected Reship

decisions.description: We now need to decide whether to resubmit the lab request or submit a notification to the end user.
decisions.name: What_is_the_Total_Reship_Attempt
decisions.label: What is the Total Reship Attempt

Flow.description: This will have all of the logic needed when a lab order has been rejected.
Flow.interviewLabel: Record Trigger - Lab Order - Lab Order Rejected {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Record Trigger - Lab Order - Lab Order Rejected

recordLookups.name: Get_Email_Template_Genetic_Testing_Rejection_Id
recordLookups.label: Get Email Template - Genetic Testing Rejection Id

recordLookups.name: Get_Email_Template_Precision_Genetic_Testing_Rejection_Id
recordLookups.label: Get Email Template - Precision Genetic Testing Rejection Id

start.filterLogic: (7 AND 9) OR (1 AND 2 AND 8) OR (3 AND 8 AND (4 OR 5 OR 6))

textTemplates.name: txt_EmailBody_AccountOwnerRejectionNotice
textTemplates.text:
Hey {!$Record.Patient__r.Owner.FirstName},

{!$Record.Patient__r.FirstName} has attempted to submit a Genetic Test Swab but the lab has rejected their submission X times. Please reach out to the customer to get them to:


  1. Come to a Physical Clinic for a Genetic Test Lab
  2. Purchase Another Genetic Test

{!form_OpportunityDirectLink}


Yours Truly,

10x Automated Service
